name: Salmon-Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Can 15-Ounce, Red or Pink Salmon, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 1 1/2-quart baking dish.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except butter and reserved crumbs.
4. Mix well.
5. Turn the mixture into the prepared dish.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining cracker crumbs.
7. Dot with butter.
8. Bake until set, about 1 hour.
9. Serve immediately.
